intro:
They ruled the Earth for millions of years.
Now one of them wants to go on a date with you.
description:
You came here to hunt dinosaurs.

Nobody warned you they'd be this cute once you caught them.

Battle prehistoric creatures in turn-based combat, wear them down, and capture them. Then watch as they transform into anime girls with a wild, primal side you won't see coming.

Each one carries her dino nature into her human form:

● A fierce T-Rex girl who challenges everything you say... but secretly respects strength
● A speedy Raptor girl who disappears mid-date and thinks that's totally normal
● A gentle Brachiosaurus girl who's soft-spoken but will absolutely not share her food

Your choices decide how close you get. And how far things go.


Features:

♥ CATCH & TRANSFORM: Take down dinosaurs in battle and unlock their irresistible anime forms. Who knew prehistoric life looked this good?

♥ TURN-BASED COMBAT: Strategy first, romance second. Master the fight to earn the date.

♥ DATES & VISUAL NOVEL CHOICES: Get to know each girl, build her trust, and unlock exclusive scenes and illustrations.

♥ PRIMAL PERSONALITIES: Every dino girl carries her ancient instincts into her human form. Expect the unexpected.

♥ MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Your results depend on your battles, your choices, and how well you read her wild side.


Sixty-five million years in the making.
Worth every second.

Are you ready to catch your perfect prehistoric match?
